loading.title: Loading your profile...
loading.serverDown: The backend server is not responding. Please start the server with "npm run dev" in the CCM_Backend_Dev-NEW folder.

overview.completeSteps: Complete these <1>4 key steps</1> to maximize your opportunities and stand out.
overview.selfAssessmentDesc: Assess yourself and discover your strengths and areas for improvement. It only takes 3 minutes! Candidates with a score above 80% are 3x more likely to be hired.
overview.moreTests: Take more tests to maximize your opportunities!
overview.callCentersDesc: Indicate which call centers you don't want to work with. You can also select those you'd like to join.
overview.proximityDesc: Indicate the cities where you're willing to work outside your current city of residence.
overview.additionalActivitiesDesc: Increase your hiring chances by adding more activities & operations that interest you.

languages.title: Language Skills
languages.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in at least the native language and the main foreign language.
languages.missingAnswerDesc: Please indicate if you speak another foreign language.
languages.missingSecondaryDesc: Please complete the secondary foreign language information.
languages.anotherLanguage: Do you speak another foreign language?

availability.title: My Availability
availability.question: What is your availability for a new position?
availability.description: Indicate your availability to maximize your chances of being contacted quickly by recruiters.
availability.tip1Desc: Increases your chances by +80% of being contacted quickly
availability.tip2Desc: Ideal if you're exploring new opportunities without urgency
availability.tip3Desc: Excellent compromise between preparation and responsiveness

contractPreferences.title: My Contract Preferences
contractPreferences.commentsPlaceholder: Add additional information about your expectations...
contractPreferences.updatedDesc: Your contract preferences have been saved.

callCenters.title: My Call Centers
callCenters.editModeActive: ✏️ Edit mode active - Select your centers then click
callCenters.optionalConfigDesc: You can configure your lists to optimize your job search. Click <1>Edit</1> to start.
callCenters.blackListDesc: Centers you want to <1>absolutely avoid</1>. They will never see your profile.
callCenters.whiteListDesc: Centers you want to <1>work with as a priority</1>. Your profile will be highlighted.
callCenters.limitBlackDesc: Maximum {{max}} centers in the black list.
callCenters.limitWhiteDesc: Maximum {{max}} centers in the white list.
callCenters.updatedDesc: Your preferences have been saved successfully.

proximity.title: Geographic Proximity
proximity.otherCities: Would you like to work in other cities?
proximity.otherCitiesDesc: Expand your career opportunities by selecting other Tunisian cities where you'd be willing to work. The more cities you select, the more job offers you'll receive.
proximity.noCitySelected: No other city selected. Click "Edit" to expand your search area.
proximity.internationalOffers: Would you like to receive offers from abroad?
proximity.internationalDesc: Open yourself to international opportunities! Many call centers abroad are looking for French-speaking profiles and offer attractive conditions (remote work, competitive salaries, career growth).
proximity.receiveIntl: You will receive offers from Tunisian and international call centers
proximity.receiveLocal: You will only receive offers from call centers based in Tunisia
proximity.updatedDesc: Your geographic preferences have been saved.
proximity.errorDesc: Unable to save your preferences. Please try again.

access.title: Manage Your Access and Privacy
access.recommendedDesc: All options are enabled by default to maximize your visibility with recruiters and multiply your job opportunities. You can adjust these settings at any time according to your privacy preferences.
access.emailNotificationsDesc: Instantly receive new job opportunities by email
access.profileVisibleDesc: Allow call centers and recruiters to view your full profile
access.dataSharingDesc: Share your data with our trusted partners for more opportunities
access.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.
access.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
access.deleteWarningDesc: This action is irreversible. Once your account is deleted, all your data will be permanently lost and you will no longer be able to access your candidate space.
access.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and all your data from our servers.
access.accountDeletedDesc: Your account has been deleted. You will be redirected...
access.enterPasswordPrompt: Please enter your password to confirm deletion:
